n: The Fishermen: Burying For Another Day

steps.t: The fishermen's supplies can be gathered around their camp in the north-eastern Whitshaws. You should gather the supplies.
The fishermen's home can be found south-west of their encampment on the lake. You should bring the supplies to the homestead and bury them, in hopes t…
Smala can be found at the fishermen's encampment in the north-eastern Whitshaws. You should tell Smala that you have buried his supplies where he wish…
